results.title: Deweese plans July 4 festivities
results.description: DEWEESE — The Deweese community will celebrate Independence Day July 4 with the annual soap box derby, followed by water slide fun the new Duck Derby event.

results.title: “Stop spending lavishly on aso-ebi, wedding makeup; support less privileged” – Emir of Zazzau
results.description: The Emir urged Nigerians to take a cue from Thai citizens, who opt for modest weddings over extravagant celebrations. The post “Stop spending lavishly on aso-ebi, wedding makeup; support less privileged” – Emir of Zazzau appeared first on Premium Times Nigeria .
